Value: Performance_glitch_user experiences significantly delayed page load on login

When logging in with the performance_glitch_user account there is a noticeable delay of approximately 3-5 seconds before the inventory page loads. All other user accounts load the inventory page near-instantly. This indicates a performance issue tied to this specific user account's session handling.
5. Observe and time the page load duration until the inventory page is fully visible
The inventory page should load within an acceptable time (under 2 seconds) for all user accounts regardless of user type.
Inventory page for performance_glitch_user takes approximately 3-5 seconds to load compared to near-instant load for standard_user. A visible and significant delay is experienced.
Intentional in SauceDemo to simulate performance issues. Documented as a real performance defect scenario.
